calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions To Determine Construction Of Trust Instruments And To Determine To Whom Property Shall Pass Upon Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kelly Dankbar for petitioner Wells Fargo Bank (by CourtCall)

In response to an inquiry from that Court as to whether she had anything to add to the submitted papers, Ms. Dankbar stated that she believed everything which supported the relief being requested was set forth in the petition. She said that while there were two possible interpretations of the language in the trust document, she believed that the proper interpretation of Ursula's trust was that the trust created a life estate for the daughter, with a remainder interest in the two granddaughters. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
